name: mog
description: Open, inspect, edit, and export Mog spreadsheets from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use Mog to open a browser-visible spreadsheet, inspect and edit workbook cells through MCP tools, and export XLSX files to explicit host paths.
defaultPrompt: Open a blank Mog spreadsheet in the browser
Open this XLSX file in Mog and summarize the visible workbook
Write values into a Mog workbook and export it as XLSX
